body:
## Summary
- Adds `/onboarding` to the first-run About guide suppression policy so the dedicated onboarding route is not covered by a second welcome dialog.
- Moves the About-the-test seen marker into an effect-scoped settings-store subscription so opening the guide marks it seen without render-time store writes.
- Carries the generated-localization template parity guard needed to keep current full content validation green until that shared fix lands on `main`.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-onboarding-route-header-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern 'first-run|onboarding|suppressed|about modal'`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-onboarding-route-copy`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-about-the-test-route-copy`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-generated-localization-template-parity`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/launch-modal-accessibility.spec.ts tests/e2e/free-bank-value-prop.spec.ts --workers=1 -g 'onboarding|first-run|modal'`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-published-question-types.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js --test-name-pattern 'generated localization|localization overlay|applyQuestionLocalizationPilot|answer template|option text|focus-generated-localization'`
- `git diff --check`
title: [codex] suppress first-run guide on onboarding
